title: Writing a Memorial Speech
description: Honoring a life publicly — the most demanding small piece of writing you will ever do.
summary_pt_br: Discurso memorial: uma anedota específica, uma verdade universal, uma linha engraçada, sem ler currículo, máx 7 minutos.

scenes.subtitle_en: Honoring a life publicly — the most demanding small piece of writing you will ever do.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Discurso memorial: uma anedota específica, uma verdade universal, uma linha engraçada, sem ler currículo, máx 7 minutos.

scenes.text_en: Honoring a life publicly — the most demanding small piece of writing you will ever do. Focus: writing a memorial speech. One specific anecdote does more than a full biography.
scenes.text_pt: Discurso memorial: uma anedota específica, uma verdade universal, uma linha engraçada, sem ler currículo, máx 7 minutos. Foco: writing a memorial speech. Uma anedota específica faz mais que biografia inteira.

scenes.title: Writing a Memorial Speech
scenes.body_en: Memorial craft: one specific anecdote. One universal truth. One line they would have laughed at. No resume-reading. Under seven minutes, always.
scenes.body_pt: Discurso memorial: uma anedota específica, uma verdade universal, uma linha engraçada, sem ler currículo, máx 7 minutos.

examples.en: One specific anecdote does more than a full biography.
examples.pt: Uma anedota específica faz mais que biografia inteira.

examples.en: One universal truth they helped you see.
examples.pt: Uma verdade universal que eles ajudaram a ver.

examples.en: One line they would have laughed at, if they could hear it.
examples.pt: Uma linha que eles ririam, se pudessem ouvir.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Writing a Memorial Speech

exercise.question: Complete: "One specific anecdote does more than a full ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "One specific anecdote does more than a full biography."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Uma anedota específica faz mais que biografia inteira.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
One universal truth they helped you see.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "One universal truth they helped you see."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Uma verdade universal que eles ajudaram a ver.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Writing a Memorial Speech — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre writing a memorial speech. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Lúcia — a memorial speech. What opens it?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: One specific anecdote, never a resume.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: One universal truth they showed me.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes — a line they'd have laughed at.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What do you protect above all?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Memorial writing is grief made generous.

scenes.title: The eulogy
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four craft rules for a memorial speech. Use at least three eulogy terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In her small study, Dona Lúcia drafted the memorial speech she would give for a friend of seventy years.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: One specific anecdote does more than a full biography — the morning she arrived at my door with burnt bread and champagne.

paragraphs.speaker: Daughter
paragraphs.en: And one universal truth she helped you see — that anything worth doing is probably worth doing imperfectly, even loudly.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: One line she would have laughed at, if she could hear it — only one. Humor is a kindness to the room.

paragraphs.speaker: Daughter
paragraphs.en: Under seven minutes always — you've taught me that a eulogy over ten minutes starts insulting the person being honored.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Memorial writing, Lúcia knew, is grief made generous — the most demanding small piece of writing a life ever asks of us.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Writing a Memorial Speech". Honoring a life publicly — the most demanding small piece of writing you will ever do. One specific anecdote does more than a full biography. One universal truth they helped you see. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Writing a Memorial Speech". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Writing a Memorial Speech".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Writing a Memorial Speech".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
